field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: Liquid adsorption chromatography at critical conditions (LACCC)

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Liquid adsorption chromatography at critical conditions (LACCC)
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry, Indiana University, Bloomington, Indiana 47405; Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing (BAM), Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany; DuPont Corporate Center for Analytical Sciences, Wilmington, Delaware 19880
conditions.corresponding_author_name: Sarah Trimpin; Steffen M. Weidner; Jana Falkenhagen; Charles N. McEwen
conditions.notes: The text describes the separation of PEO mixtures with different end groups using LACCC. The setup is used for fractionation, but the conditions are explicitly identified as critical conditions for the PEO backbone to separate by end group independent of molar mass.
